examples: We will focus on SOA solutions but the concept can be used ubiquitously.
It isn't as ubiquitously advertised now, but it hasn't disappeared from the market.
You can see an example of the REST style as ubiquitously as the World Wide Web itself.
In a world of connected screens, the venerable TV continues to wait in isolation while the personal computer and the cell phone have become ubiquitously connected.
For true Bitcoin believers, every setback is a minor inconvenience along the road to a bright future in which all fiat currencies are swapped for the ubiquitously accepted Bitcoin.
